allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: improve SpaceNavigator HUD with velocity arrows and approach speed

- Add velocity arrows that show player movement direction relative to locked body
- Calculate approach speed instead of absolute speed for more useful info
- Improve arrow positioning with configurable start/end positions
- Add square root curve for better low-speed sensitivity
- Update scene with new HUD settings

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
docs: update CLAUDE.md with new systems and controls

- Add SpaceSuit and JetpackController to player systems
- Add HUD & UI System section with SpaceNavigator and SpaceSuitStatus
- Add Controls section documenting all player inputs
- Document space-only roll adjustment with Q/E
- Include scene changes for new HUD components

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
